testcases.name: SJV-EAA-8
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and non-recursive selective disclosures only of JSON Objects

testcases.name: SJV-EAA-9
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and non-recursive selective disclosures only of JSON Arrays elements

testcases.name: SJV-EAA-10
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and non-recursive selective disclosures of both JSON Objects and JSON Arrays elements

testcases.name: SJV-EAA-11
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and recursive selective disclosures only of JSON Objects

testcases.name: SJV-EAA-12
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and recursive selective disclosures only of JSON Array Elements

testcases.name: SJV-EAA-13
testcases.description: Mandatory elements only, and recursive selective disclosures  of both JSON Objects and JSON Array elements

testcases.name: SJV-QEAA-1

Mandatory elements, without selective disclosures; without key binding;

. iss

. given_name
. family_name

iss_reg_id (if applicable and NOT in the qualified certificate)
